raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tai paſcha Stundâ iſ-
nahze tur Pirkſti tapatt ka kab-
da Zilweka Rohlas/ tee rakſtija
prett to Lukturi/ us to kehnixa
Pils baltu aptaifitu Seenu/ un
tas Kehnisch redſeja to Rohlas
Gabbalu/ kas rakſtija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad pahrwehrtijahs ta
Kehnina Gihmis/ un winna
Dohmas to iſtruhzinaja/un win-
na Gurni nogurre/ un winna
Leeli drebbeja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehnisch brehze
ſtipri / ka bij tohs Swaigsnu-
Zeenitajus/ tohs Kaldeeerus / un
Baredſetajus atwest/ untas Keh-
nisch atbildeja / un faſtija us
teem Babeleß Gudrein : Wiſe/
kas schohs Rakſtus laſſihs / un
tohs paſchus man iſtahstihs /
tas taps ar Purpuri apgehrbts
ar felta Schlehdehin apkahrt
winna Raſlu/ un winch buhs
par treschu Walditaju ichinni
Walſtiba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nahze wiſee Kehnixa
Gudree eekſcha/ bet tee ne war-
reja tohs Rakſtus laſſiht / nedg
tam Kehninam tohs iſtahſiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad iſtruhzinajahs tas
Kehnisch Belsazers fohti/ un
winna Gihmis pahrwehrtijahs/
un winna Warrenee behdajahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Par to gahje ta Kehni-
ſtine / ta Kehnixa un winna
Warrenn Wahrdn deht tai Iſta-
bâ/ fur Dſihres bija/ un ta keh-
ninne runnaja un faſzija: Laï
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Teju irr weens Wih-
tawâ Walſtiba/ eekſch ka t
ſwehtu Deewu Gars irr/ jo ta
wa Tehwa Laika irr pee winn-
atraſts Gaischnung un Sapra-
ſchana un Gudriba/ ittin ka t
Deewu Gudriba irr/ un taw
Tehws Nebukadnezars eezeht
to par Wirſneeku pahr teen
Gudreim / Swaigsnu-Zeenita-
jeem/ Kaldeeereem un Baredſeta-
jeem/ (to varrija) tawâ Tehws
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht ka weens augſt
Gars pee ta atrasts tappe/ u
Saprachana tohs Sapnis is
ſtaſtibt/un Mihklas atminnebt,
un Noflehpnuns iſfazziht/ prob-
ti Dantjels / ko tas Kehninsc-
likke Belsazer nosaukt. Aizina-
nu Dantjelu/ tas tew to iſtah-
ſihs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad tappe Danijele
preekſch ta Kehnixa wests. u
tas Kehnisch atbildeja/ un fa-
zija us Dantjelu: Eſſi tu ta-
Dantjels / weens no teem Ais-
westein no Juhda/ ko tas Keh-
nisch mans Tehws no Juhda-
afsweddis ter ?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es efimu no tewim dfir-
dejs/ ka to Deewu Gars eekſ-
tewim irr / un ka Gaifma u
Saprachana/ un leela Gudrib-
pee tewim atrasta tohp.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu tre preekſch man at-
westi tee Gudree/un Swaigsnu-
Zee
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
